center.name: 彼得·博达尔特
center.summary: 彼得·博达尔特是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联20种鸟类，包括Sungrebe、禿䴉、Capped heron等20种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: centralis in the Hardap Region of Namibia | image2 = Tricholaema leucomelas, kontakroep, Buffelsdrift, a.mp3 | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Tricholaema | species = leucomelas | authority = (Boddaert, 1783) | synonyms = *Tricholaema affine | range_map = Tricholaema leucomelas supersp, verspreiding, a.png | range_map_caption = }} The acacia pied barbet or pied barbet (Tricholaema leucomelas) is a species of bird in the family Lybiidae which is native to southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African pygmy kingfisher (Ispidina picta) is a small insectivorous kingfisher found in the Afrotropics, mostly in woodland habitats

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Pilherodius pileatus Río Amacayacu, Amazonas, Colombia The capped heron (Pilherodius pileatus) is a water bird endemic to the neotropics, inhabiting rainforest from the center of Panama to the south of Brazil.Ridgely, R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The greater striped swallow (Cecropis cucullata) is a large swallow that is native to Africa south of the equator

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The helmeted pygmy tyrant (Lophotriccus galeatus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, Colombia, French Guiana, Guyana, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pied water tyrant (Fluvicola pica) is a small passerine bird in the tyrant flycatcher family. It is found in Brazil, Colombia, French Guiana, Guyana, Panama, Peru, Suriname, Trinidad, and Venezuela, as a vagrant to Ecuador and possibly other areas as well.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The sungrebe or American finfoot (Heliornis fulica) is a small aquatic gruiform found in the tropical and subtropical Americas from northeastern Mexico to central Ecuador and southern Brazil.Luo, Miles

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The variegated antpitta (Grallaria varia) is a species of bird in the family Grallariidae. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Colombia, the Guianas, Paraguay, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-cheeked barbet or small green barbet (Psilopogon viridis) is a species of Asian barbet found in southern India

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|in Ecuador The white-winged swallow (Tachycineta albiventer) is a resident breeding swallow in tropical South America found in Brazil, Colombia, Venezuela, Trinidad, and Argentina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The wing-banded antbird (Myrmornis torquata) is a species of passerine bird in subfamily Myrmornithinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, French Guiana, Guyana, Nicaragua, Panama, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Malabar pied hornbill (Anthracoceros coronatus), also known as the lesser pied hornbill, is a bird in the hornbill family, a family of tropical near-passerine birds found in the Old World

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The great barbet (Psilopogon virens) is an Asian barbet native to the Indian sub-continent and Southeast Asia, where it inhabits forests up to altitude

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brahminy kite (Haliastur indus), also known as the red-backed sea-eagle in India, is a medium-sized bird of prey in the family Accipitridae, which also includes many other diurnal raptors, such as eagles, buzzards, and harriers, found in the Indian subcontinent, Southeast Asia, and Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Visayan hornbill (Penelopides panini) is a hornbill found in tropical moist lowland forests of the Philippines in the Western Visayas region which includes the islands of Panay, Negros and formerly as well as the island of Masbate, and formerly Ticao, in the Philippines

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The eastern cattle egret (Ardea coromanda) is a species of heron (family Ardeidae) found in the tropics, subtropics and warm temperate zones

birds.evidence: The brown-headed cowbird (Molothrus ater) is a small, obligate brood parasitic icterid native to temperate and subtropical North America
